mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sos (member_id, title, type, content, expired_at, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{content}, #{expiredAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT sos_id, member_id, title, type, content, expired_at, status, created_date FROM sos WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_date DESC

SELECT s.sos_id, s.member_id, b.name AS business_name, s.title AS sos_title, s.type AS sos_type, s.created_date AS created_at, s.expired_at, b.business_addr, b.business_addr_detail, i.storage_key AS profile_image FROM sos s LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN business b ON b.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN profile_image i ON i.member_id = m.member_id WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.expired_at > NOW() ORDER BY s.created_date DESC

SELECT s.sos_id, b.name AS business_name, b.business_id, m.badge, b.business_addr, b.business_addr_detail, s.title AS sos_title, s.type AS sos_type, s.content AS sos_content, s.expired_at, s.created_date AS created_at, si.sos_image_id, si.storage_key AS image_key, i.storage_key AS profile_image FROM sos s JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id JOIN business b ON b.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sos_image si ON si.sos_id = s.sos_id LEFT JOIN profile_image i ON i.member_id = m.member_id WHERE s.sos_id = #{sosId}
